query:
WITH unique_pos AS (
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' AS poNumber UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504564634' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504566881' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504644297' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504646788' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504711475' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504713676' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504804493' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504804576' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504806894' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505341368' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505343489' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505346688' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505466118' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505468307' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505471600' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505509864' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505511918' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505515012' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505566147' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505568173' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505571223' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505671544' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505673687' UNION
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505677150'
), matched_products AS (
  SELECT p.id, p.poNumber
  FROM products p
  INNER JOIN unique_pos u ON u.poNumber = p.poNumber
)
SELECT
  u.poNumber,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mp.id) AS productCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT st.id) AS taskCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) AS eventCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sr.id) AS samplingResultCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT psd.id) AS productivityScoreDetailCount
FROM unique_pos u
LEFT JOIN matched_products mp ON mp.poNumber = u.poNumber
LEFT JOIN station_tasks st ON st.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN sampling_results sr ON sr.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.station_event_id = se.id
GROUP BY u.poNumber
ORDER BY u.poNumber;
